ddls:
CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "data_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., Int8, Uint16) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "equivalent_c_type" TEXT /* Equivalent C type for the data type */,
  "min_value" TEXT /* Minimum value that the data type can represent */,
  "max_value" TEXT /* Maximum value that the data type can represent */,
  "storage_size" INTEGER /* Storage size of the data type in bytes */,
  "is_signed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the data type is signed or unsigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "array_constructors" (
  "constructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each array constructor */,
  "constructor_name" TEXT /* Name of the array constructor (e.g., Int8Array, Uint16Array) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the array constructor */,
  "element_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data type of the elements in the array */,
  "element_size" INTEGER /* Size of each element in the array */,
  "is_fixed_size" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the array constructor allows fixed-size arrays */,
  "is_resizable" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the array can be resized */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for elements in the array when not specified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("constructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_array_constructors_element_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversion_operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion operation */,
  "operation_name" TEXT /* Name of the conversion operation (e.g., ToInt8, ToUint16) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the conversion operation */,
  "source_data_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source data type */,
  "target_data_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the target data type */,
  "is_lossy" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the conversion operation is lossy */,
  "conversion_function" TEXT /* Name of the function that performs the conversion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "arrays" (
  "array_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each array */,
  "constructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the array constructor used */,
  "array_name" TEXT /* Name of the array */,
  "array_size" INTEGER /* Size of the array */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User who created the array */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the array was created */,
  "is_persistent" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the array is persistent (stored on disk) or transient (in memory) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("array_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_arrays_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_arrays_constructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("constructor_id") REFERENCES array_constructors ("constructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "array_elements" (
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each element */,
  "array_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the array that the element belongs to */,
  "element_index" INTEGER /* Index of the element within the array */,
  "element_value" TEXT /* Value of the element */,
  "is_null" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the element is null */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the element was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_array_elements_array_id FOREIGN KEY ("array_id") REFERENCES arrays ("array_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "array_operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation */,
  "array_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the array that the operation was performed on */,
  "operation_name" TEXT /* Name of the operation (e.g., indexing, slicing, concatenation) */,
  "operation_date" TEXT /* Date when the operation was performed */,
  "performed_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User who performed the operation */,
  "operation_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the operation in milliseconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_array_operations_performed_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_array_operations_array_id FOREIGN KEY ("array_id") REFERENCES arrays ("array_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user has administrative privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "array_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "array_id" INTEGER /* ID of the array being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the array */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the array was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in milliseconds */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_array_access_array_id FOREIGN KEY ("array_id") REFERENCES arrays ("array_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_array_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documentation" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each documentation entry */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data type */,
  "constructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the array constructor */,
  "doc_name" TEXT /* Name of the documentation */,
  "doc_description" TEXT /* Description of the documentation */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the documentation was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the documentation was last updated */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User who created the documentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documentation_constructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("constructor_id") REFERENCES array_constructors ("constructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documentation_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documentation_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "meta_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "array_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the array */,
  "meta_name" TEXT /* Name of the metadata */,
  "meta_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the metadata was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the metadata was last updated */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User who created the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meta_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_array_id FOREIGN KEY ("array_id") REFERENCES arrays ("array_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "array_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "array_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the array */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User who created the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_array_versions_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_array_versions_array_id FOREIGN KEY ("array_id") REFERENCES arrays ("array_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "array_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the array */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "granted_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User who granted the permission */,
  "granted_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission was granted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_array_id FOREIGN KEY ("array_id") REFERENCES arrays ("array_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_granted_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("granted_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "array_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the array */,
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the operation */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the operation was performed */,
  "performed_by_user_id" INTEGER /* User who performed the operation */,
  "log_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the operation in milliseconds */,
  "log_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the operation was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_operation_id FOREIGN KEY ("operation_id") REFERENCES array_operations ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_array_id FOREIGN KEY ("array_id") REFERENCES arrays ("array_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_performed_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
